title: EurekaMon
description: Cobblemon pack with trainers, optimizations, multiplayer ready, adventuring, and QOL mods.
body:
# EurekaMon
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Fabric-8a7b71)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft%20Version-1.21.1-blue)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Channel-Release-green)
![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/7iQvuqKP)

> Cobblemon pack with a focus on Trainer Battles, Optimization, and QOL/Vanilla+ mods. Also includes mods for Exploration, Building, Adventuring, Structures, Tech, and Visual enchancements.  

**Features Include**

**Worldgen** - Terralith and Tectonic add new realistic and fantasy biomes. Updated End by Nullscape, and Spiral and Hobbit Villages.

**Travel** - Ride Cobblmon, fast travel with Waystones, or use Elytra with armor.

**Cobblemon** - Raid Dens, RadGyms, CobbleNav, Outbreaks, CobbleDollars, Spawn Alerts, Wonder Trade, Gacha, Battle Tower, and more!

**Exploration** - Explore many new structures including overhauled Fortresses, Strongholds, Temples, Mineshafts, and more from Yung's Mods.

**Quests** - Basic quest book has been added to help introduce you to some of the mods.

**Building Tools** - Construction Wands, Additional blocks from Chipped, Just Hammers, and Luminous Blocks. 

**QOL** - Updated crafting recipes, larger item stacks, Inventory Sorting, Rightclick Harvesting, Vein Mining, BetterMending, Magnets, Grindstone Enchantment Removal, CarryOn, and much more.

**Storage** - Tom’s Simple Storage Mod and Drawers for those fancy large storage options. Iron Chests to increase storage chest sizes, Metal Bundles to make looting easier, and backpacks from Yyz Backpacks!

**Loot** - Instanced player loot with Lootr so you never have to worry about a dungeons loot already being taken. Lootr and Cobblemon compatibility included!

**Automations** - BotanyPots and Trees, Easy Mob Farm, Oritech, and Chunk Loaders.

**Performance** - FerriteCore for memory optimizations, Sodium for rendering engine, More Culling to not render things when you can't see them, and so much more.

**Visual/Audio Overhaul** - Extra effects from Particular, Subtle Effects, Fresh Animations packs, Show Me your Skin, Ambient Sounds, Cobblemon Anime SFX, Pokdex SFX, and Cobblemon music.

**Shader Ready** - Iris is built in to allow shaders, with some already included!

And a lot more mods to help round the pack out like E4MC, Exteme Sound Muffler, Distant Horizons, Freecam, Mighty Mail, Universal shops, and more.

**Credits** -
